hypothesis: Continual pre-training of a MOF-focused LLM on paired MOFid strings and computed coarse-grained 3D descriptors (pore volume, surface area, largest cavity diameter, and metal-node coordination count) will enable the model, after supervised fine-tuning on existing hMOF/QMOF splits, to achieve a lower mean absolute error than CGCNN on hMOF CO2 adsorption prediction at 0.5 bar.
